top_signals.title: A 1,700% Jump Turns Retail Trader Favorite Sivers Into Short Bet
top_signals.summary: A small Swedish semiconductor firm that’s soared about 1,700% this year has become one of the country’s most-shorted stocks.

top_signals.title: Former CIA chief Petraeus says drone swarms are the next danger — and growth opportunity
top_signals.summary: Unmanned systems will be one of the biggest security threats and structural growth opportunities in defense over the next decade: David Petraeus
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mark Zuckerberg says a Meta cloud computing business 'definitely on the table'
top_signals.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said his company could enter the cloud computing market if it overspends on data centers and has excess capacity.
